nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Rehoboam and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Rehoboam and all that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

cnv.text: 羅波安其餘的事蹟和他所行的一切，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 罗波安其他的事及其一切所作所为都记在犹大的列王史上。
